posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The item page view is static across every single item in the board. I’d like to suggest the ability to make it more dynamic, so that if, for example, the Category of Item1 is A and the Category of Item2 is B, they’ll see different fields/configurations of the item page.

What are you trying to achieve

Making the item page more dynamic depending on a filtered selection.
